examples: My head sank easily into the soft pillow.

definitions.text: Smooth and flexible; not rough, rugged, or harsh.
examples: Polish the silver with a soft cloth to avoid scratching.

definitions.text: Be quiet; hold; stop; not so fast.
A soft-headed or foolish person; an idiot.
A tyre whose compound is softer than mediums, and harder than supersofts.
Softly; without roughness or harshness; gently; quietly.
